name: Creole Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into 7 equal serving pieces.
2. In a bowl, mix flour, salt, paprika, and pepper.
3. Dredge each piece of meat in the seasoned flour mixture.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a large frying pan.
5. Lightly brown onions and green peppers in the oil; remove them from the pan.
6. Brown the meat in the remaining oil.
7. Add the browned meat to the pan with onions and green peppers.
8. Cut up tomatoes and add them along with their liquid to the meat.
9. Sprinkle rice into the pan, then add broth and water.
10. Mix thoroughly. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and cover tightly.
11. Simmer for 1 1/2 hours or until the meat is tender, stirring occasionally.
To help cut down on cooking time, purchase tenderized round steak. Use Minute Rice.
Nutritive value per serving: CHO 21 gm., PRO 30 gm., FAT 22 gm.
Calories 409, Sodium 1018 mg.
Food Exchanges per serving: 4 Medium-Fat Meat Exchanges plus 1 Bread Exchange plus 1 Vegetable Exchange
